title: serratula heterophilla
intro: Serratula heterophylla, also known as the Himalayan Indian plum or Himalayan Indian plum daisy, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is a medicinal plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits. The plant is known for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, fever, and digestive issues. Serratula heterophylla can be consumed as a tea or used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
